evals.prompt: I want to evaluate how strong our test suite is for the payment processing module. Can you run mutation testing and tell me which mutations survive?
evals.expected_output: Mutation testing analysis with list of surviving and killed mutants
expectations: Response references specific mutation operators (e.g., boundary, operator, return value)
Response does NOT suggest only running existing unit tests

evals.prompt: Generate unit tests that would catch all surviving mutants in this function that calculates shipping costs based on weight and distance.
evals.expected_output: Comprehensive unit tests with edge cases and boundary testing
expectations: Response contains boundary or edge case testing
Response includes multiple test cases covering different scenarios
Response does NOT suggest only happy-path tests
